backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that stores per-user favorite radio stations in a Map, exposing addFavorite, removeFavorite, and getFavorites shared functions.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two implemented features: replacing PWA icons with a user-provided ICP-hosted image, and removing the yellow pulsing dot from the GlobeView component.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON catalogue of short summaries for each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key details of every component, hook, and service in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based monochrome design tokens for light and dark themes via CSS custom properties.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point configuring PWA metadata (manifest, theme-color, Apple tags) and favicon/apple-touch-icon all pointing to the user-provided ICP-hosted antenna image, plus Space Grotesk and Space Mono font imports.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA manifest for the Antenna app using the ICP-hosted image URL for both the 256px and 512px icon entries with a dark background/theme color.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing view routing (stations/favorites/globe), search state, audio amplitude tracking via Web Audio AnalyserNode, and favorites CRUD through React Query mutations.
frontend/src/components/AppHeader.tsx: App header component rendering the Antenna title, a search toggle button, and three view-tab buttons (Stations, Saved, Globe) with active-state styling.
Canvas-based frequency bar visualizer that reads from a Web Audio AnalyserNode and renders monochrome greyscale bars, with a ResizeObserver to keep canvas dimensions in sync.
frontend/src/components/BottomToolbar.ts: Renders the bottom playback toolbar with volume slider, play/pause/stop controls, theme toggle, fullscreen toggle, and a meatball menu with share/info options.
Renders an animated 3D Earth globe using Three.js/React Three Fiber with a pulsing marker at a station's geographic coordinates, supporting light/dark theme adjustments.
frontend/src/components/FullscreenOverla: Full-screen overlay that displays the FullscreenGlobe, audio visualizer, station info, playback status, and rotating anti-subscription slogans with fade transitions.
frontend/src/components/GlobeView.tsx: Interactive 3D globe view using Three.js/React Three Fiber that plots radio station markers by country coordinates, supports hover tooltips, click-to-select, and OrbitControls with theme-aware lighting.
frontend/src/components/HUDLayout.tsx: Simple layout wrapper component that renders children inside a full-height background container.
Displays the currently playing station's name, playback/stream health status, audio visualizer, and a rotating list of anti-subscription slogans when no station is playing.
frontend/src/components/RadarWidget.tsx: A canvas-based animated radar widget that visually reflects radio playback state (playing, loading, paused, error) by modulating sweep speed, trail brightness, and blip rendering based on audio amplitude.
frontend/src/components/SearchPanel.tsx: A search form component for filtering radio stations by name, genre tag (with quick-select buttons), and country (with a filterable dropdown), triggering search callbacks on input or Enter key.
frontend/src/components/StationList.tsx: Renders a scrollable list of radio stations with play state indicators, favicons, and favorite toggle buttons, supporting both API RadioStation and backend Station types.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider for ICP, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching, adding, and removing favorite stations via the ICP backend actor, plus a utility to convert API RadioStation objects to the backend Station type.
frontend/src/hooks/useRadioPlayer.ts: A React hook managing radio stream playback with an HTML Audio element and Web Audio API analyser, handling play/pause/stop, volume, retry logic on stream failure, and stall detection.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: Custom React hook that manages dark/light theme state, persists the preference to localStorage, and toggles the 'light' class on the document root.
frontend/src/hooks/useWakeLock.ts: Custom React hook that requests a Screen Wake Lock API lock when enabled and re-acquires it on tab visibility changes, releasing it when disabled or unmounted.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file defining Tailwind base/components/utilities, OKLCH-based CSS custom property palettes for dark and light themes, typography, scrollbar styling, and autofill overrides.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/services/radioBrowserApi.ts: Service module wrapping the Radio Browser API to fetch top stations, globe stations (deduplicated from votes and clickcount), search stations, fetch countries/tags, and register station clicks.
frontend/src/utils/geoMapping.ts: Utility file providing a lookup table mapping country names to their approximate latitude/longitude coordinates for use in geographic visualizations.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH CSS-variable-based color tokens, Space Grotesk/Mono fonts, custom border radii, and accordion/fade-in animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking version, existing features (PWA icon replacement and globe pulsing dot removal), and architectural notes for the Antenna radio app.
